name: PetitPotam
summary: PetitPotam is a Python PoC that uses the MS-EFSRPC (Encrypting File System Remote Protocol) to coerce Windows hosts to authenticate to a remote listener. Famous for the ADCS NTLM relay chain (ESC8).

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
